headlines.description: — Even after a spectacular individual performance, Jonathan Taylor was all about praising his Indianapolis Colts teammates Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Taylor runs for 244 yards and 3 TDs for Colts in 31-25 OT win over Falcons in Berlin

events.name: New York Giants at Chicago Bears

headlines.description: — It was a listless Sunday afternoon for the Chicago Bears up until the very end. That's when Caleb Williams and company found a way.
headlines.shortLinkText: Caleb Williams stars as the Bears rally past the Giants for a 24-20 win

headlines.description: — Tua Tagovailoa had only beaten Buffalo once in his career before Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins end seven-game losing streak against Bills with 30-13 win

headlines.description: — Lamar Jackson calmly and coolly added another Baltimore win to his resume in his 100th regular-season start, watching the Ravens' defense stay strong against a quarterback playing in his fourth NFL game.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ravens win 3rd straight game, get 3 takeaways to take down gaffe-prone Vikings 27-19

events.name: Cleveland Browns at New York Jets

headlines.description: — The New York Jets made some franchise history in the span of 36 seconds. Then they held on the rest of the way for their second win in a row.
headlines.shortLinkText: Jets get TD returns on a kickoff and a punt and hold on to beat Browns 27-20 for 2nd win in a row

events.name: New England Patriots at Tampa Bay Buccaneers
New Orleans Saints at Carolina Panthers

headlines.description: — The New Orleans Saints have been looking for stability at quarterback for quite some time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rookie Tyler Shough throws for 2 TDs to earn first win as Saints defeat Panthers 17-7

headlines.description: — In a team meeting Saturday night, coach DeMeco Ryans showed the Houston Texans a video of a boxer who dislocated his shoulder and still managed to knock out his opponent.
headlines.shortLinkText: Backup QB Davis Mills and Texans overcome 19-point, fourth-quarter deficit to stun Jaguars 36-29

headlines.description: — Before Sunday, DeMarcus Lawrence had scored two touchdowns in 148 NFL games over 12 seasons.
headlines.shortLinkText: DeMarcus Lawrence scores 2 defensive TDs and Seahawks dominate Cardinals in 44-22 win

events.name: Los Angeles Rams at San Francisco 49ers

headlines.description: — Matthew Stafford punctuated his fourth touchdown pass of the day that capped a three-game run that had never been achieved before in the NFL with a little bit of a shimmy shake.
headlines.shortLinkText: Matthew Stafford throws 4 TDs as Rams beat 49ers 42-26 for their 4th straight win

events.name: Pittsburgh Steelers at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — The beat-up Los Angeles Chargers laid a beatdown on Aaron Rodgers and the Pittsburgh Steelers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chargers humble Aaron Rodgers and Steelers 25-10 in prime time for 3rd straight win
